Ahirwar Associate Professor Employee ID: 0700302 Qualification: Ph.D. : 0731-2582178 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Sunil Kumar Ahirwar is currently working as Associate Professor in Civil Engineering and Applied Mechanics Department of SGSITS Indore. He obtained his B.E. (Civil Engg.) in 2004 from MITS Gwalior, M. Tech (Geotechnical Engg.) in 2006 from MNNIT Allahabad and Ph.D. Degree (Civil Engineering) in 2022 from IIT Bombay. He is actively engaged in teaching, research and consultancy. His research interests include Ground Improvement, Soil-Structure Interaction, Railway Geo-technology, Pavement Geo-technology, Environmental Geotechnics, Geo-technology for Waste Materials, Geosynthetics and Reinforced soil Structures. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Year University/Institute Division Specialization 1 B.E. 2004 MITS Gwalior I st Civil Engineering 2 M. Tech. 2006 MNNIT Allahabad I st Geotechnical Engineering 3 Ph.D. 2022 IIT Bombay 8.18/10 Civil Engineering Geotechnical Engineering M.Tech. Dissertation Title: Sorption & Desorption Studies of Soil Contaminated with Heavy Metals PhD Dissertation Title: Experimental Studies on Geosynthetics Reinforced Soil Foundation Work Experience: S.No. Employer Designation Department Duration of Employment-In Months Date of Joining Mode of Employment 1 RITES Limited, Gurgaon Project Engineer Urban Transport and Infrastructure Division 01 14-Aug-2006 Contract 2 SGSITS, Indore Lecturer Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 48 30-Sep-2006 Regular 3 SGSITS, Indore Assistant Professor Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 12 01-Oct-2010 Regular 4 SGSITS, Indore Assistant Professor (Senior Scale) Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 68 14-Oct-2011 Regular 5 SGSITS, Indore Assistant Professor (Selection Grade) Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 48 14-Oct-2016 Regular 6 SGSITS, Indore Associate Professor Civil Engineering & Applied Mechanics 39 14-Oct-2019 Regular Other Academic Experiences and positions/responsibilities held (i) Deputy Exam Controller, SGSITS, Indore 2024 (ii) Deputy Coordinator, RGPV Nodal Centre SGSITS, Indore (iii) Honorary Secretary : Institution of Engineers (India) Indore Local Chapter, Indore Research Details: Area of Research Interests Ground Improvement Soil-Structure Interaction Environmental Geotechnics Transportation Geotechnics Geotechnology for Waste Materials Geosynthetics and Reinforced soil Structures Publications: A.
